segment.source: Renders a legal-style section with heading, a WCAG 2.1 conformance-level badge (A, AA, or AAA), a rich-text statement body, an optional last-updated date, and a feedback channel with a linked contact email. Use it for: accessibility statements, WCAG or EAA/BITV conformance declarations, barrier-reporting contact sections found in legal source documents. Prefer 'Imprint' for company legal notices and 'Privacy Notice' for data-protection text.
